description_long: This is a single low-top sneaker with a fabric upper in a muted grayish tone and a white rubber sole. The shoe features a standard lace-up closure, though the laces are frayed and partially untied, with some ends sticking up. The fabric material shows visible signs of wear, including creasing and discoloration, especially around the toe box and heel. The heel area is slightly collapsed, and the inner lining is partially visible, indicating heavy use. The sole is relatively thick and flat, with a textured edge, but the tread pattern is not visible in these views. Overall, the shoe appears to be a casual, everyday sneaker that has seen significant use.
description: A worn gray low-top sneaker with frayed laces and a white rubber sole, showing visible signs of heavy use and fabric wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the frayed, untied laces and creased toe box.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the worn fabric upper and flat white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the collapsed heel and exposed inner lining.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible lace details and overall shoe shape.
